Contact


Positions: We are interested in recruiting highly motivated undergraduates, graduate students, and postdocs who share our scientific curiosity and interests. Prospective undergraduates and postdocs should contact the PI directly. Prospective graduate students should gain admission to one of the graduate programs for which the PI serves as a trainer, including the Comparative Biomedical Sciences (CBMS) Graduate Program and the Bacteriology Grad Program. Students may be eligible for NIH training grant support, including through the Parasitology and Vector Biology Training Program.



Phone: +1 (608) 262-0311
Fax: +1 (608) 262-7420
E-mail: mzamanian at wisc.edu
Address:
PI Office: Room 205
Lab Rooms: 223, 229, 230, and 235
Hanson Biomedical Sciences Lab
University of Wisconsin–Madison
1656 Linden Drive
Madison, WI 53706-1581
